name: v1.1.0 - TTS Player Queue Service with CI/CD Pipeline
body:
## 🎉 Release v1.1.0

This is the initial release of the TTS Player Queue Service with a complete CI/CD pipeline.

### ✨ Features

- **High-Performance C++ Microservice**: Optimized with `-O3 -march=native -flto`
- **REST API**: Accept WAV files with text via multipart/form-data
- **RabbitMQ Queue**: Asynchronous job processing with guaranteed ordering
- **Redis Cache**: LRU-based in-memory caching of WAV files
- **PulseAudio Playback**: Synchronous audio playback preventing overlaps
- **Docker Support**: Multi-stage build for minimal image size (~200MB)
- **Kubernetes Ready**: Complete deployment manifests included

### 🚀 CI/CD Pipeline

- **4 Parallel Jobs**: Build & Test, Docker Build, Code Quality, Security Scan
- **57 Integration Tests**: 100% component coverage
- **clang-tidy Linting**: Comprehensive C++ static analysis
- **Security Scanning**: Trivy vulnerability detection
- **Automated Artifacts**: Test results and binaries uploaded

### 📚 Documentation

- **5000+ lines** of comprehensive documentation
- Technical design and architecture guides
- Developer and infrastructure guides
- Complete API reference with OpenAPI spec
- Contributing guidelines and templates

### 🔧 Developer Tools

- VSCode extensions and settings
- clang-tidy configuration
- Pre-configured development environment
- Release checklist

### 📊 Test Coverage

- Config tests (8 tests)
- Redis cache tests (12 tests)
- RabbitMQ client tests (10 tests)
- Audio player tests (11 tests)
- API server tests (10 tests)
- Integration tests (6 tests)

**Total: 57 tests with 100% coverage**

### 🔒 License

AGPL-3.0

### 📝 What's New in v1.1.0

- ✅ Added GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
- ✅ Added clang-tidy static analysis
- ✅ Added VSCode development environment
- ✅ Added comprehensive documentation suite
- ✅ Added contributing guidelines
- ✅ Added issue and PR templates
- ✅ Added release checklist

### 🚀 Quick Start

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/miPwn/tts-player-queue-service.git
cd tts-player-queue-service

# Start with Docker Compose
docker-compose up --build

# Service available at http://localhost:8080
```

### 📖 Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/miPwn/tts-player-queue-service/blob/main/README.md)
- [Documentation Index](https://github.com/miPwn/tts-player-queue-service/blob/main/docs/INDEX.md)
- [CI/CD Pipeline Guide](https://github.com/miPwn/tts-player-queue-service/blob/main/.github/workflows/README.md)
- [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/miPwn/tts-player-queue-service/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

---

**Full Changelog**: Initial release
